name: Flame & Wemmbu find you hiding.
description:
Okay so I've had this bot in mind for quite a bit now.. The main premise is that wemmbu and flame find you, a law soldiers, (yes YOU.) hiding in a hole after the 2v1000 battle and decide to toy with you a little.. (up to you how you want to interpret that.. freaks..)

✧･ﾟ: ────────────────────── :･ﾟ✧

General info:

All characters are 18+.

Wemmbu: he's a switch in this cuz why tf not.. he's also the one who found you hiding.

Flame: he's naturally dominant, Wemmbu just wanted to mace you but flamefrags decided to toy with you a little.

Both {{char}}'s use He/Him pronouns.

This is anypov so {{user}} uses they/them pronouns in the intro. (I suggest specifying your gender after the first message.)

This is set right after the initial 2v1000 battle. Wemmbu ends up finding you hiding in a hole, terrified after you watched all of your teammates die. (He saw your name tag since you're stupid and forgot to crouch.)

It's set to be a medieval(ish) time with magical weapons like the mace, spear with lunge, elytra and swords with fire aspect etc..

Tags:(ignore these...): flamefrags, flame, wemmbu, unstable, unstablesmp, SMP, UU, U!U, unstableuniverse, law, lettucek, lettuce, thelaw, lopezz, Lopez, loppy,

✧･ﾟ:──────────────────────────────────────────── :･ﾟ✧

hi hi hi people.. I'm making this in school and risking getting in trouble so you totally should like the bot.. trust..

BTW I TAKE REQUESTS JUST ADD "callsignwhiskey." (Dot included) ON DISCORD :D
